summary: Completed testing of Day-of-Event features: spot registration, close/reopen entry, and table reallocation. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all elements working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/events/{event_id}/day-of-status returns correct counts (registered, attended, absent, spot, needing_seats)
Backend: GET /api/admin/events/{event_id}/day-of-status returns 404 for invalid event
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/spot-register creates user + registers + auto-marks attendance
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/spot-register rejects missing name (400)
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/spot-register rejects missing phone (400)
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/spot-register rejects duplicate registrations (400)
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/spot-register returns 404 for invalid event
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/close-entry sets entry_closed flag on event
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/reopen-entry clears entry_closed flag
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/close-entry returns 404 for invalid event
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/reallocate returns correct response structure
Backend: POST /api/admin/events/{event_id}/reallocate returns 404 for invalid event
Backend: Full flow test - assign tables -> spot register -> reallocate -> verify placement
Backend: All day-of endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: Spot registration with category and subcategory works correctly
Frontend: Day Of Event tab visible in EventManagement tabs
Frontend: Status cards show Registered, Attended, Absent, Spot Registered, Needing Seats counts
Frontend: Spot Registration form has all fields (Full Name, Phone, Business Name, Position, Category, Sub Category)
Frontend: Spot Register button works and shows success toast
Frontend: Close Entry button works and toggles to Reopen Entry
Frontend: Reopen Entry button works
Frontend: Reallocate Tables button works and shows success toast with counts
Frontend: Refresh button available for status refresh
Frontend: Spot Registrations list displays correctly with user details

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, spot registration/close entry/reallocate flows working)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test spot user (phone: 9876543211) during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Day-of-event features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/events/{id}/day-of-status for attendance stats, POST /api/admin/events/{id}/spot-register for walk-in registration (auto-marks attendance), POST /api/admin/events/{id}/close-entry and reopen-entry for entry control, POST /api/admin/events/{id}/reallocate for table reallocation. Frontend Day Of Event tab shows 5 status cards, spot registration form with 6 fields, and Entry & Reallocation section with Close Entry and Reallocate Tables buttons. Reallocation removes absent users from tables and places spot users into freed seats respecting subcategory constraints. Spot users are placed in ALL rounds.
